summary: Comprehensive testing of Kaisō Sushi website per user corrections. All key features verified: correct brand logo in header/footer (NOT QR code), menu default tab is handhelds, gold WhatsApp buttons, required email field, QR code on reservation success page, admin panel working.
passed_tests: ✅ Header logo is /assets/logo-kaiso.png (brand logo, NOT QR code) - 221KB, 1024x1024
✅ Menu default tab is 'Bocadillos & Hamburguesas Kaisō' (handhelds category first)
✅ First menu items: Kaisō Sushi Burger, Bocadillo de Salmão – Dog Roll
✅ Each menu item has TWO gold buttons: WhatsApp icon + External link (kaisosushi.es)
✅ All WhatsApp buttons are gold (bg-kaiso-gold), NO green (#25D366) buttons anywhere
✅ Reservation Email field is REQUIRED - label shows 'EMAIL *' and input has required attribute
✅ Reservation success page shows QR code at /assets/qr-delivery.png (600x600, 1KB)
✅ QR code section: '10% Descuento Delivery' with 'Estafeta propio, sin intermediarios'
✅ Footer: Phone +34 673 036 835 with WhatsApp icon, correct address, copyright 2026
✅ Footer: No Emergent-related links (only standard 'Made with Emergent' badge)
✅ Japanese text on sections: お品書き (menu), フランチャイズ (franchise), 寿司と日本料理 (sushi & cuisine)
✅ API /api/availability/2026-02-26 returns correct data (Thursday discount, tasting slots)
✅ Admin panel at /admin with credentials admin/reservas works
✅ Admin dashboard: 4 stats cards, RESERVAS/CONFIGURACIÓN tabs, date navigation, CSV export
✅ Reservation flow: Date → Time → Details → Confirm → Success (all steps working)
✅ Reservation auto-confirmed with 'RESERVA CONFIRMADA AUTOMÁTICAMENTE' badge
seed_data_creation: Created test reservation: Test User, +34 612 345 678, test@example.com, 2026-02-27 19:45
context_for_next_testing_agent: All user corrections verified: logo fixed (brand logo not QR), menu handhelds first, gold WhatsApp buttons, required email, QR on success page. Full reservation flow tested and working. Admin panel functional. No issues found.
